reasons: VIX regime transitioning (escalating) — signals may not hold 5 days
COT extreme_short — strong contrarian signal available
Macro data inline with expectations — less directional clarity

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (0.52) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 0.8% move to $22.48 (weekly expected move: 5.4%).

thesis: Momentum (91) and trend_persistence (85) both point bearish, and in the normal VIX regime these signals run at baseline weight — no headwind from regime multipliers. Tight credit spreads (HY OAS 2.76%) signal complacency, which historically correlates with 50.4% directional accuracy — mediocre, but the put direction acts as a portfolio hedge if the high holding-window risk (Monday event) triggers a broad selloff. **Kill condition:** If PYPL breaks above its 20-day SMA by >2% on Monday/Tuesday, the bearish momentum thesis is broken — exit immediately. Hard stop at -50%.

COT extreme_short — strong contrarian signal available
Macro data inline with expectations — less directional clarity

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (4.97) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 2.0% move to $319.97 (weekly expected move: 4.0%).

thesis: Flow conviction (95) is the dominant differentiator — this isn't just a momentum chase but has institutional flow backing the bullish direction, with trend_persistence (95) confirming the trend is durable. Social sentiment flags "release" and "upgrade" catalysts, suggesting a product or analyst event may provide the weekly catalyst. **Kill condition:** AAPL has earnings flagged this week — if it reports and iPhone/Services revenue disappoints or forward guidance is cut, exit immediately. Also, if Monday's high-impact event (holding window risk) triggers a broad risk-off move and AAPL gaps >2% lower at open, skip entry entirely per gap-stop rules.
